title: Inventory disabled
body:
Disable the inventory for players.Customize and modify the disabled slots in inventory_disabler.json.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14549908760710296e36e94ef112c4bc76c133be.png)

If you have any feedback or suggestions, please contact me via email: xgfgd@foxmail.com
